HEADLINE | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This March figure—newly reported and confirmed by Statistics Korea—marks a modest rebound amid oil volatility, aligning with Bank of Korea's recent 2.2% yearly outlook (up from 2.1%) while holding rates at 2.5% for a sixth meeting; it could shift prediction markets on BoK policy or inflation paths given prior moderation trends and external risks.[1][3]

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), below market forecasts of 2.4% but up due to Middle East energy shocks.**[1]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Counts Lead Tweet Markets Buzz | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Counts Lead Tweet Markets Buzz | NO | MED confidence**  
Active tweet markets like "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" show 88% odds on 300-319 tweets with $28.4M volume, and "Elon Musk # tweets April 14 - April 21, 2026?" at high engagement with $13M volume, suggesting traders on X are tracking Musk's activity closely for short-term plays[3][4].
